data.name: 捆绑日记
data.detailed_description:
· This is a role-playing game of the simulation management type

· There are several stories in the game, and each story corresponds to a female protagonist. After entering the story, the game will proceed in the form of an interactive visual novel. Players need to make the right choices to continuously gain the trust of the female protagonist and develop from strangers to playmates. And then play a bundled game with the female lead.

· Beautiful game graphics

· Novel gameplay
data.about_the_game:
· This is a role-playing game of the simulation management type

· There are several stories in the game, and each story corresponds to a female protagonist. After entering the story, the game will proceed in the form of an interactive visual novel. Players need to make the right choices to continuously gain the trust of the female protagonist and develop from strangers to playmates. And then play a bundled game with the female lead.

· Beautiful game graphics

· Novel gameplay
data.short_description: The male lead has an unknown hobby: he likes to play bundling games with beautiful women. The game tells the story of the male protagonist and several female playmates' journey from getting to know each other, getting to know each other well, to agreeing to play a bundling game together.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5 9400f
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5 9600f
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1080
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
